correction_reason: Every row timed out; no model output was ever observed. The original artifact admitted these as measurements and emitted a numeric headline computed from rows that saw nothing. A timeout has no score.
note: The original artifact is retained unmodified as evidence of the defect. This file supersedes its headline only.

supersession_2.reason: The first correction recorded these rows as TIMEOUTS. That is true but incomplete. Plain /api/generate shows qwen3.5:0.8b writing 16,214 chars into `thinking` and returning a 0-char `response` in 121s, and OllamaClient.extract_text never reads `thinking`. So even on return there was no final response to score.
supersession_2.operational_result: thinking-only generation exceeded the edge budget
supersession_2.interpretation: Earlier zero-valued ladder results are superseded by NULL measurements. Latency and token use remain valid operational telemetry; quality is not measured. No capability conclusion may be drawn from these rows.
supersession_2.note: Under the tested Ollama request path, with thinking not explicitly disabled, Qwen3.5 generated a substantial thinking payload but no final response content. Because the extractor and scorer operate only on final response content, the run yielded no admissible quality observation.
